summary: Get Multiple Ad Offers from Adobe Target
description:
To verify we are getting multiple Ad Offerings from Adobe Targeting (requires set up w/ help from Devs)

GIVEN developers have set up Adobe Target w/ multiple offers



More info about implementation here:

[https://baseball.atlassian.net/browse/WQ-3330|https://baseball.atlassian.net/browse/WQ-3330|smart-link] 

and in thread here: [https://mlbam.slack.com/archives/C074ZEST63A/p1765216082991009|https://mlbam.slack.com/archives/C074ZEST63A/p1765216082991009|smart-link]

steps.action:
WHEN user opens the ‘Network’ Tab in Dev Tools

AND searchs for a '*mbox' POST* request
steps.result:
THEN the response should include multiple mboxes

Basically looking for an [array] with with multiple options that will update our redux configs.

steps.action:
WHEN a user then starts an archive or live game stream.

AND that game is ads Enabled (adsEnabled: True can be found in ‘graphQL’ initPlaybackSession)

AND one of these mboxes enabled DAI API Service
steps.result:
THEN the user should then be able to see a DAI API ‘stream’ calls in Network Tab:

* {{https://dai.google.com/linear/v1/hls/event/*/stream}} (the stream init URL)
* {{https://dai.google.com/linear/v1/pa/event/*/stream/{Google Stream ID}/metadata}} (this polls every 10 seconds or so)



Note: 

* {{/stream}}: DAI API
* {{/streams}}: IMA SDK
